## Checklist

- [ ] `Import-Module ./TenantToolbox.psd1 -Force` loads without errors
- [ ] `Invoke-ScriptAnalyzer -Path . -Recurse` produces no new warnings
- [ ] New cmdlet added to `FunctionsToExport` in `TenantToolbox.psd1`
- [ ] Comment-based help (`.SYNOPSIS` / `.DESCRIPTION` / `.EXAMPLE`) present
- [ ] State-changing cmdlets support `-WhatIf`
- [ ] README table and `CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] **No real tenant data** in the diff (reports are in `.gitignore`)
